articles.title: Fishing crew rescued near Gloucester after boat runs aground amid harsh seas
articles.description:

The post Fishing crew rescued near Gloucester after boat runs aground amid harsh seas appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Fishing crew rescued near Gloucester after their boat ran aground in rough seas.
Gloucester Mayor Paul Lundberg praised the coordinated rescue efforts by local agencies.
The incident highlights the dangers of fishing in harsh weather conditions for local crews.

articles.title: New Bedford man gets decades-long prison sentence for raping young relative
articles.description:

summary: New Bedford man sentenced to decades in prison for raping a young relative.

articles.title: Congo to receive third-country deportees from the US under new deal
articles.description:
The Congolese government said Sunday that the deportees will start arriving in Congo in April. At least seven other African nations have received migrants being deported from the U.S. under similar arrangements.

The post Congo to receive third-country deportees from the US under new deal appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Congo will begin receiving U.S. deportees starting in April 2024.
At least seven African nations have similar deportation agreements with the U.S.
Boston residents may see increased discussions on immigration policies due to this deal.
